case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ERNEST E. MATHEWS JR. et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MATHEWS, ERNEST E. HEARING SET FOR DEC-15-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-15-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ERNEST MATHEWS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ERNEST MATHEWS' Motion To Set Aside Default is Granted. Defendant has shown good cause, which is supported by the strong policy of deciding cases on their merits. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Ntc Of Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Continued To Jan-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ERNEST MATHEWS'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT.
Appearances: Ernest Mathews, Jr. (no card provided) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona; counsel appeared for plaintiff (no card provided).
Defendant provided the court with a courtesy copy of his motion. The court continued the matter to January 10, 2012. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
